title: Perform animal slaughter in accordance with Halal certification requirements
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Perform animal slaughter in accordance with Halal certification requirements demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for Halal slaughter

pcs.text: Identify and apply the rules and conditions required for Halal slaughter
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and apply the rules and conditions required for Halal slaughter?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and apply the rules and conditions required for Halal slaughter.

pcs.text: Check workplace for hazards, identify risks and apply control measures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Check workplace for hazards, identify risks and apply control measures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Check workplace for hazards, identify risks and apply control measures.

pcs.text: Prepare Halal approved equipment prior to slaughter and confirm knife is sharp, and restrainer is operational
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare Halal approved equipment prior to slaughter and confirm knife is sharp, and restrainer is operational?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare Halal approved equipment prior to slaughter and confirm knife is sharp, and restrainer is operational.

pcs.text: Prepare self and equipment according to enterprise hygiene requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare self and equipment according to enterprise hygiene requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare self and equipment according to enterprise hygiene requirements.

pcs.text: Perform stunning using stunning method and strength approved by public health and Islamic authorities
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform stunning using stunning method and strength approved by public health and Islamic authorities?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform stunning using stunning method and strength approved by public health and Islamic authorities.

pcs.text: Identify animals dying before slaughter as non-Halal, and report to supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify animals dying before slaughter as non-Halal, and report to supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify animals dying before slaughter as non-Halal, and report to supervisor.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for Halal slaughter

elements.title: Perform Halal slaughter

pcs.text: Position animal on the left side facing Kiblah, and in a manner that confirms the slaughter is quick and pain-free
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Position animal on the left side facing Kiblah, and in a manner that confirms the slaughter is quick and pain-free?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Position animal on the left side facing Kiblah, and in a manner that confirms the slaughter is quick and pain-free.

pcs.text: Confirm animal insensibility prior to commencing slaughter process
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm animal insensibility prior to commencing slaughter process?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm animal insensibility prior to commencing slaughter process.

pcs.text: Follow required Halal slaughter procedures, applying one cut just below glottis in short-necked animals and severing the major vessels whilst uttering prayer
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow required Halal slaughter procedures, applying one cut just below glottis in short-necked animals and severing the major vessels whilst uttering prayer?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow required Halal slaughter procedures, applying one cut just below glottis in short-necked animals and severing the major vessels whilst uttering prayer.

pcs.text: Perform slaughter process within established timeframe
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Perform slaughter process within established timeframe?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Perform slaughter process within established timeframe.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Perform Halal slaughter

elements.title: Complete slaughter operations

pcs.text: Clean and sterilise facilities and equipment according to workplace requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean and sterilise facilities and equipment according to workplace requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean and sterilise facilities and equipment according to workplace requirements.

pcs.text: Identify, record and report any carcase and offal that do not meet Halal requirements, and confirm that it is segregated from Halal carcases and offal
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify, record and report any carcase and offal that do not meet Halal requirements, and confirm that it is segregated from Halal carcases and offal?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify, record and report any carcase and offal that do not meet Halal requirements, and confirm that it is segregated from Halal carcases and offal.

pcs.text: Identify and attach labels to be used on Halal meat products
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and attach labels to be used on Halal meat products?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and attach labels to be used on Halal meat products.

pcs.text: Complete post-slaughter documents within organisational timeframes
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete post-slaughter documents within organisational timeframes?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete post-slaughter documents within organisational timeframes.

pcs.text: Complete equipment storage to avoid cross-contamination according to Halal requirements
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Complete equipment storage to avoid cross-contamination according to Halal requirements?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Complete equipment storage to avoid cross-contamination according to Halal requirements.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Complete slaughter operations

evidence_guide.title: Third Party Report — Workplace Supervisor (Required)
evidence_guide.description: Completed by your direct supervisor — the strongest evidence item for RPL.

evidence_guide.title: Position description
evidence_guide.description: Your current position description showing duties relevant to this unit.
